title: CHA Anaheim & at Home
excerpt: The 3rd photo is from my PS I Love You mini album .What the Pea Ordered features a video of my last order from Two Peas in a Bucket. Yes I did get SIX of those white Uniball signo pens…
body:
The 3rd photo is from my PS I Love You mini album.What the Pea Ordered features a video of my last order from Two Peas in a Bucket. Yes I did get SIX of those white Uniball signo pens. Which probably explains why they are sold out. Click "Notify Me" and you'll get a message when they are back in stock.

If you're at CHA, hopefully you will stop and say hi to us in the American Crafts booth in the 2600 aisle. For those of you at home, we hope you're joining in on the fun at the CHA online social.

I did a little interview with Two Peas where I answered questions about the design process for Yes, Please on their blog.

NOTE: Creativation (formerly CHA)
